name: Allied Architects, Inc.
summary: Allied Architects, Inc. provides social media marketing services in Asia. The company provides SaaS-type products; Letro and Lertro Studio, a video production tool service; Monipla, a platform for marketing; echoes, a service for instant win campaigns; brandtouch, a fan marketing cloud; and Social-IN, a hashtag curation tool, as well as solutions for SNS advertising and account operations; Web promotions; and fan marketing solutionss. Allied Architects, Inc.was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
